sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_shapes (id UInt32, shape Polygon) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO geo_shapes (id, shape) VALUES (1, readWKTPolygon('POLYGON((2 0,10 0,10 10,0 10,2 0))'));
SELECT id, toTypeName(shape) AS shape_type FROM geo_shapes WHERE shape = readWKTPolygon('POLYGON((2 0,10 0,10 10,0 10,2 0))');
UPDATE geo_shapes SET shape = readWKTPolygon('POLYGON((1 1,5 1,5 5,1 5,1 1))') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, shape FROM geo_shapes WHERE area(shape) > 20;
